summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Shawn Power mayoral campaign website. All 8 backend API tests passed. All key frontend features verified including hero, about, platform (5 cards), volunteer form (submission + validation), donate section, footer, nav scroll, and back-to-top button.

issues: Placeholder image shows a Black man in a suit at a community center - this is a stock photo that may not represent Shawn Power. Main agent should replace with actual candidate photo.

action_items: Replace placeholder candidate photo in About section with actual photo of Shawn Power

The About section contains placeholder text '[More details about Shawn's background, career, family, and community involvement will be added here by the family.]' - fill in with real content when available
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured. MongoDB _id excluded correctly via projection {"_id": 0}.
No authentication on GET /api/volunteers and GET /api/contact - any user can view all submitted form data. Consider adding admin auth if needed.
The donate section has a note: 'The specific e-transfer email will be confirmed shortly' even though powerformayor@gmail.com is already shown - minor inconsistency
seed_data_creation: Created test volunteer and contact entries via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs and frontend features work correctly. Volunteer form submits to /api/volunteers and shows success message. Validation for required fields (name + email) works. Nav scroll, back-to-top, 5 platform cards, footer contact info all verified.
